hero.tagline: A versatile Software Engineer crafting exceptional and accessible digital experiences.

about.title: My Approach
about.paragraph1: As a passionate Software Engineer with practical experience in full-stack web development and agile methodologies, I thrive on building innovative solutions. My background includes deploying applications, managing backend and frontend systems, and collaborating with international teams to deliver high-quality results.
about.paragraph2: My international experience has honed my adaptability and collaboration skills, allowing me to excel both independently and in dynamic, multicultural environments.

education.title: Education
education.details: Faculty of Informatics and Electronics. 9 academic periods (approx. 4.5 years).

experience.title: Professional Experience
experience.job1_desc: Training artificial intelligence models by writing, analyzing, and refining code-based datasets. Responsibilities include crafting high-quality programming examples, debugging code snippets, and ensuring content meets strict accuracy standards across languages like Python, JavaScript, Java, and C#. Collaborating with technical teams to improve AI reasoning capabilities.
experience.job2_desc: Designed and implemented responsive web applications using React and Node.js to enhance user experience. Collaborated with clients across different time zones, meeting deadlines and delivering customized solutions. Managed version control and CI/CD pipelines using GitHub and DigitalOcean.
experience.job3_desc: Developed a functional website for the university, focusing on user experience and performance. Integrated modern development tools and implemented responsive design principles.
experience.job4_desc: Supported students in understanding core programming and web development concepts. Assisted professors with course materials and provided support during hands-on lab sessions.
experience.job5_desc: Worked in the hospitality and restaurant industry across multiple US states during summer cultural exchange programs. Significantly enhanced English fluency (reaching C1 Advanced level) and developed strong interpersonal and cross-cultural communication skills.

projects.title: Case Studies
projects.backendNote: Note: Some projects include a backend hosted on a free service. The initial load might be slow as the server "wakes up." Thank you for your patience!
projects.project1_desc: A Python-powered API extracts metadata (title, description, image) from a URL, displayed in a React frontend preview card.
projects.project2_desc: A full-stack application that analyzes the sentiment of a text using a Python backend and a professional React interface.
projects.project3_desc: A professional, interactive diagram demonstrating Clean Architecture concepts for a full-stack application.
projects.project4_desc: An interactive diagram that illustrates the automated CI/CD pipeline for deploying a modern web application.
projects.project5_desc: An interactive playground to test a live REST API. Users can fetch product data by ID and view the real-time JSON response.
projects.project6_desc: A professional sign-up form that provides instant feedback, validating user input in real-time to enhance user experience.
projects.project7_desc: A professional, multi-page dashboard application featuring interactive charts and a modern user interface.
projects.project8_desc: A full-stack demo showcasing secure user registration and login using JSON Web Tokens (JWT).
projects.project9_desc: A simple and visual demo where users can enter text or a URL, and a Python backend generates the corresponding QR code image instantly.

otherProjects.title: Featured Code Repositories
otherProjects.subtitle: Applying my knowledge, I have also developed the following projects. While they don't have live demos, the source code reflects my skills in architecture, logic, and implementation.
otherProjects.repo1_desc: An application for learning computer networks, built with a modern frontend and a powerful headless CMS.
otherProjects.repo2_desc: A CRUD application for English language development, featuring voice recognition to correct pronunciation.
otherProjects.repo3_desc: An interface using Strapi as a backend CMS to manage CRUD operations for a testing application, connected to PostgreSQL.
otherProjects.repo4_desc: A gamified learning object designed to help users understand complex maintenance systems through interaction.

contact.title: Interested in working together?
contact.prompt: My inbox is always open. Whether you have a question or just want to say hi, I'll do my best to get back to you! I'm particularly open to remote opportunities in growth-oriented environments.
